name: create_agent
description: Create a new Drone agent in the Hive system. This will: 1) Insert a record into Supabase agents table, 2) Create SOUL.md and tools.json in GitHub repo, 3) Sync to OpenClaw workspace.

name.description: Unique agent name. Lowercase, no spaces, use hyphens. Example: 'code-reviewer'

system_prompt.description: Full system prompt for the agent. Be specific about the agent's role, capabilities, constraints, and output format.

tools.description: List of tool names this agent can use. Choose minimal set needed.

max_iterations.description: Maximum reinforcement loop iterations before escalation

name: update_agent
description: Modify an existing agent's configuration. Logs the change in agent_mutations with reason.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent to modify

new_value.description: New value for the field. For tools: JSON array as string. For status: active/paused/archived.

reason.description: Why this change is needed. Be specific — this goes into the audit log.

name: create_task
description: Create a new task and optionally assign it to an agent. If no agent specified, Secretary decides.

description.description: Detailed task description with all context needed for execution

assign_to.description: Agent name to assign to. Leave empty for Secretary to decide.

evaluation_criteria.description: How to evaluate the result. Be specific about what good output looks like.

parent_task_id.description: UUID of parent task if this is a sub-task

name: github_commit
description: Create or update any file in the hive-core repository, directly on the main branch.

file_path.description: Path relative to repo root. Example: 'agents/coder/SOUL.md'

commit_message.description: Descriptive commit message. Format: '[agent-name] action description'

name: list_agents
description: List all agents in the system with their current status, model, and recent task performance.

name: get_task_history
description: Get full attempt history for a task, including all scores and feedback. Useful for analyzing why a task is failing.

name: archive_agent
description: Archive an agent (soft delete). Agent becomes inactive but data is preserved.

reason.description: Why the agent is being archived
